title: tragacantha plebeia
intro: Tragacantha plebeia, also known as the Lesser Burnet, is a plant species belonging to the pea family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha plebeia include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
